EmailTemplate.description: Candidate rejection email - No recent clinical experience
EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Candidate rejection email - No recent experience
EmailTemplate.subject: {!Contact.FirstName} - Alliance Rural & Remote Health - Thank you for your enquiry
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for taking the time to apply with us. We regret to inform you that we won’t be moving forward with your application at this time.
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
